goldentweaks.error_tooltip: An error occurred that caused this tweak to fail. Please check your logs for more information.
When enabled, Leaves will no longer cast an Ambient Occlusion shadow on adjacent blocks.
goldentweaks.tweak.dark_ambient_occlusio: When enabled, the shadows between adjacent blocks will be darker.
goldentweaks.tweak.full_face_shading.too: When enabled, the lighting on block models will be applied to each individual element independent of their position in the model.
goldentweaks.tweak.big_stars.tooltip:
When enabled, the stars will be ~2x bigger like in Beta.

This tweak requires a restart to take effect.
goldentweaks.tweak.flat_items.tooltip: When enabled, dropped items will be rendered 2D and flat.
goldentweaks.tweak.dark_water_lighting.t: When enabled, Water will block 3 light levels per layer instead of 1.
goldentweaks.tweak.old_footsteps.tooltip: When enabled, all mobs will make player-like footsteps based on the block they are standing on.
goldentweaks.tweak.beta_main_menu.toolti: When enabled, the main menu will be modified to look like the one that appears in beta versions.
goldentweaks.tweak.mojang_logo.tooltip: When enabled, the loading screen will appear as the one from the version selected.
goldentweaks.tweak.old_block_shapes.tool: When enabled, blocks like Fences and Chests will have full block shapes.
goldentweaks.tweak.dirt_gui_background.t: When enabled, the panorama will be replaced with a dirt background like in Beta 1.7.3 and before.
goldentweaks.tweak.old_panorama_blur.too: When enabled, the panorama will be rendered blurry
